meta_description: Learn how to Claude Code skills setup and overcome can't debug code. A Advanced-level Tutorial using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: Claude Code Skills Setup: Debugging for Student Developers
content.seo_description: Master Claude Code skills setup to conquer debugging. A professional-grade tutorial for student developers using Antigravity to build high-performance software.
content.answer_block: To overcome debugging gridlock, integrate Claude Code with your IDE to automate root-cause analysis. By leveraging Antigravity to map your architecture, you transform cryptic stack traces into actionable refactoring tasks. This workflow allows you to shift from manual troubleshooting to high-level architectural oversight, drastically accelerating your development velocity and code quality.
content.intro:
You are staring at a screen filled with red text, the silence of your room amplified by the frustration of a broken build. Every developer has been here: the moment where logic fails, the debugger offers no clarity, and the project grinds to a halt. It is the crucible of learning, but it doesn't have to be a wall.

Today, we pivot. We are moving beyond manual print-debugging into the realm of AI-augmented engineering. By mastering Claude Code and Antigravity, you gain an expert-level pair programmer that doesn't just suggest fixes—it understands your entire codebase. This is how you transition from student coder to professional software architect.

steps.title: Environment Initialization
steps.description: Establish a secure, context-aware environment where Claude Code can index your local repository without overhead.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze my project directory structure and identify the primary entry points and dependency graph.

steps.title: Mapping the Failure Surface
steps.description: Use Antigravity to visualize the data flow, helping Claude understand where the state transition is failing.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Map the execution flow for the function causing the current error and highlight potential race conditions.

steps.title: Automated Trace Diagnostics
steps.description: Feed the stack trace into the Claude context to generate a hypothesis for the bug origin.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Correlate this stack trace with the recent commits and suggest the most likely module responsible for the regression.
steps.claude_code_command: claude ask 'Explain this stack trace and propose a surgical fix that maintains architectural integrity.'

steps.title: Iterative Refactoring
steps.description: Apply the fix using Claude's ability to refactor surrounding code to prevent future regressions.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Refactor this module to use dependency injection, ensuring the fix is testable and robust.

steps.title: Validation and Integration
steps.description: Run automated verification to ensure the fix doesn't break upstream dependencies.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Verify this fix against the existing unit test suite and suggest any necessary test updates.

pro_tips: Always use the 'context-scope' flag in Claude Code to limit the AI's focus to the relevant module, preventing hallucinations from unrelated files.
When debugging, feed the 'git diff' of your last working state into the prompt to provide a temporal baseline for the regression.
Leverage Antigravity to generate pseudo-code documentation before you ask Claude to write the actual implementation; it keeps the AI aligned with your logic.
Configure your .claudeignore file to exclude large build artifacts or vendor folders, ensuring Claude spends its context window on your business logic.
Treat Claude Code as a junior engineer: ask it to explain its reasoning before applying any changes to verify it has correctly identified the root cause.
content.next_steps: Once your debugging workflow is automated, focus on setting up a CI/CD pipeline that integrates these Claude Code checks into your GitHub Actions workflow for continuous quality assurance.
content.conversion_block: You now possess the toolkit to dismantle complex bugs and scale your applications with confidence. Stop fighting your code and start commanding it. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
